title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Freshworks Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Freshworks Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
We at Freshworks Ventures Solutions are looking for an experienced Software Engineer based out of Navi Mumbai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Freshworks Ventures Solutions:
Freshworks Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Freshworks Ventures Solutions!
